title: Lexpure Seron RO+UV+Alkaline+Silver NANO
description: Lexpure Seron RO UV Alkaline Silver NANO water purifier with 7-stage purification technology. Designed for borewell, tanker and municipal water, it provides safe drinking water with advanced antimicrobial protection.

title: Lexpure Ivory Alkaline Ro Water Purifier (Gray)
description: Lexpure Ivory RO Alkaline water purifier available in Pune. Advanced RO UV Alkaline purification system with mineral enhancement for healthy and tasty drinking water.

title: Lexpure Seron RO+UV+Alkaline+Silver NANO (Refurbished/Promo)
description: Lexpure Seron Silver NANO RO water purifier for homes. Provides multi-stage purification with alkaline technology and antimicrobial protection for safe family drinking water.

title: Lexpure Vedic Alkaline (Black)
description: Lexpure Vedic Alkaline RO water purifier in Pune with RO UV Alkaline technology and TDS controller. Ideal for homes using borewell and tanker water with high TDS levels.

title: Cruze Nobel RO+Alkaline Water Purifier
description: Cruze Nobel RO Alkaline water purifier for Pune and Moshi homes. Heavy-duty purification system with durable MS coated body and high TDS handling capability.

title: Lexpure PP Spun (Pack of 1)
description: Original Lexpure PP Spun filter cartridge for RO water purifiers. Removes dust, sand, rust and suspended particles to improve water quality and protect the RO membrane.

specifications.title: Usage
specifications.description: Pre-filter for domestic RO water purifiers

specifications.title: Replacement
specifications.description: Replace every 3-6 months depending on water quality

title: 50 LPH Lexpure RO Water Purifier
description: 50 LPH commercial RO water purifier designed for offices, schools, hotels and industries. High-capacity RO system provides continuous purified drinking water.

specifications.title: Application
specifications.description: Office, School, Hotel and Industrial Use

title: 25 LPH Commercial RO Water Purifier
description: 25 LPH commercial RO water purifier available in Pune for offices, clinics and businesses. Provides safe drinking water through advanced multi-stage purification.

specifications.title: Suitable For
specifications.description: Offices, Clinics, Shops and Commercial Places

title: Purosis Water Purifier (RO+UV+TDS+Alkaline)
description: Purosis RO UV TDS Alkaline water purifier for homes. Advanced purification removes bacteria, viruses, heavy metals and improves taste with alkaline technology.

specifications.title: Impurity Removal
specifications.description: Removes bacteria, viruses, heavy metals and dissolved salts

title: Finepure Water Purifier (RO+TDS+Copper+Alkaline)
description: Finepure Copper Alkaline RO water purifier with advanced filtration technology. Provides safe drinking water by removing harmful impurities.

specifications.title: Removes
specifications.description: Arsenic, rust, pesticides and dissolved impurities
